# AI Premium Shop (AIPS)

> Bangladesh's #1 premium AI subscription shop. We offer shared and personal-account plans for ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, Cursor, and 70+ other AI tools at BDT-friendly prices, delivered within minutes via bKash, Nagad, or Rocket.

Canonical domain: https://aipremiumshop.com/

## Priority pages

- [All Products](https://aipremiumshop.com/products) — full catalogue of 76+ AI subscriptions with BDT pricing
- [Pricing](https://aipremiumshop.com/pricing) — sortable, filterable pricing table across all categories
- [Bundles & Packages](https://aipremiumshop.com/bundles) — curated multi-tool bundles at discounted rates

## Category pages

- [AI Assistant & Chat](https://aipremiumshop.com/ai-assistant) — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Grok, Microsoft Copilot (22 tools)
- [AI Image & Design](https://aipremiumshop.com/ai-image) — Midjourney, Ideogram, Leonardo AI, Canva Pro (10 tools)
- [AI Video](https://aipremiumshop.com/ai-video) — Runway, HeyGen, Pika Labs, Opus Clip, Descript (11 tools)
- [AI Voice & Music](https://aipremiumshop.com/ai-voice-music) — ElevenLabs, Suno AI, Udio, Murf AI (8 tools)
- [AI Code & Dev Tools](https://aipremiumshop.com/ai-code) — GitHub Copilot, Cursor, v0.dev, Replit (6 tools)
- [AI Workspace](https://aipremiumshop.com/ai-workspace) — Notion Business, Manus AI, Otter AI, Gamma (5 tools)
- [AI Writing & SEO](https://aipremiumshop.com/ai-writing) — Grammarly Premium, QuillBot, Jasper AI, Writesonic (7 tools)
- [AI Design](https://aipremiumshop.com/ai-design) — Adobe Firefly, Canva Pro (2 tools)
